heading: Continuation of Committee
label: 6634 Continuation of Committee
notes: Abolition of President’s Committee on Science and Technology; Transfer of FunctionsSee note set out under .section 6631 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: Ninety days after submission of the final report prepared under , the Committee shall cease to exist, unless the President, before the expiration of the ninety-day period, makes a determination that it is advantageous for the Committee to continue in being.section 6633 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: If the President determines that it is advantageous for the Committee to continue in being, (1) the Committee shall exercise such functions as are prescribed by the President; and (2) the members of the Committee shall serve at the pleasure of the President.
